species.citation: (Lindl.) Benth. ex Baill. , Bull. Mens. Soc. Linn. Paris, 1st Ser. 1 (1885) 495 ; Backer & Bakh.f., Fl. Java 1 (1963) 405; Pancho & Gruezo, Vasc. Fl. Mt Makiling 2 (2006) 427; ≡ Astrapaea wallichii Lindl. , Coll. Bot. (Lindley) (1821) t.14.

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 698 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 46.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Cambodia, China, India, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Sri Lanka, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Bataan, Cagayan, La Union, Laguna, Pampanga, Quezon, MINDANAO, NEGROS, SAMAR.
species.notes: Probably an introduced plant in the Philippines, but now thoroughly naturalized. Open, rather damp grasslands and lake shore vegetation.

Vasc. Filip. (1886) 67.
species.distribution: Borneo, Cambodia, India, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Philippines, Singapore, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. BASILAN, BORACAY (photos), DUMARAN, GUIMARAS, LEYTE, LUZON: Abra, Albay, Batangas, Cagayan, Camarines, Cavite, Ifugao, Ilocos, Ilocos Norte, Laguna, NCR, Nueva Ecija, Nueva Vizcaya, Pangasinan, Quezon, Rizal, Zambales, MASBATE, MINDANAO: Davao, South Cotabato (photos), MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, ROMBLON, SIBUYAN, TICAO.
species.notes: Throughout Luzon. Forests at low and medium elevation. Common. 0-1000m.
